title: Event loop refresher
body: Call stack, microtasks, setImmediate vs nextTick.

title: REST checklist
body: Idempotent methods, proper status codes, pagination.

title: Validation ideas
body: Reject empty title; tags max 10; body max 10k chars.

title: CORS for SPA
body: Allow localhost frontend origins in development.

title: Request ID
body: Propagate X-Request-Id from client or generate UUID.

title: Nested todos
body: Later stages will move notes to Nest + Postgres.

title: Filter by tag
body: GET /notes?tag=http should return only matching notes.

title: Empty search
body: q= with no matches returns empty array, not 404.
